source_files.description: PSS/E v31 RAW file containing the full ERCOT network model
Bus name mapping with station and voltage level metadata
Branch thermal rating overrides and seasonal limits
Generator cost curves and fuel type classifications
Load distribution factors by weather zone and bus
Transformer tap position settings and regulation bands
Switched shunt device status and control parameters
Contingency definitions for N-1 and N-2 analysis

notes: Default manifest for ERCOT FNM ingestion. SHA-256 checksums are populated after first successful parse via update_manifest_checksums().
